summary: The article satisfies the copy-paste prompt intent as a publish-ready SEO guide, adds VogueAI-specific workflow value, and includes localized structured content for every public locale.
strengths: Directly answers how to copy and adapt AI image prompts with a first-screen TL;DR.
Includes concrete prompt blocks while keeping public prompt examples English-only.
Adds a scenario matrix, worked example, mistake/fix table, and deeper FAQ.
Maps GPT Image 2, Nano Banana, and Midjourney to use cases inside the workflow.
Fits VogueAI's structured blog-data system instead of forcing an MDX publish path.
